settings.subheading: Clinical K-beauty ingredients. EU certified formulations. Prices that respect you.

settings.text: Open your mind to the possibility of honest, clinical skincare — only with SHIEH

settings.heading: Your skin can't read a price tag
settings.body_1: A 5% niacinamide molecule doesn't care if it costs £24 or £80. We use the same clinical-grade ingredients as luxury brands — at a fraction of the price. Every concentration listed. Every formula EU certified. Zero compromise on quality.
settings.body_2: The result: products that outperform £80 competitors on paper and in practice. Not because we're cheaper. Because we stopped paying for the opacity.

settings.heading: All Skin Types
settings.text: Formulated to work across all skin types and concerns. Gentle yet effective, our products adapt to what your skin needs.

settings.heading: EU Certified
settings.text: Every product is ECOCERT COSMOS certified, meeting the strictest European safety and sustainability standards.

settings.heading: K-Beauty Science
settings.text: Korean cosmetic science meets European quality standards. Clinical ingredients, simplified routines, proven results.

settings.heading: Transparency
settings.content: We list every active ingredient and its clinical concentration on the label and website. No proprietary blends, no hidden formulas. You know exactly what you're putting on your skin.

settings.heading: Quality
settings.content: Made by MĀDARA Cosmetics Group in Latvia — 19 years of organic cosmetic manufacturing expertise. ECOCERT COSMOS certified, vegan, cruelty-free. Every batch tested.

settings.heading: Pricing
settings.content: We don't believe in the luxury markup. Our £24 Niacinamide Gel contains the same 5% concentration as serums sold for £80+. The molecule doesn't know the price tag.

settings.heading: Certifications
settings.content: ECOCERT COSMOS Natural certified. Vegan Society approved. Cruelty-free. Dermatologically tested. No parabens, sulfates, or silicones. Made in EU.

settings.heading: You're Being Lied to by Your Skincare Label.
settings.subheading: Download The INCI Guide — the cosmetic scientist's toolkit for decoding ingredient lists, spotting filler concentrations, and buying skincare that actually works. Free, immediate, no strings.
settings.note_text: No spam. Unsubscribe at any time.
